title: Harris vs Trump: Latest news on drastic change to 2024 election
shortDescription: Americans wake up to an upended 2024 election race after Joe Biden dropped out and endorsed VP Kamala Harris in the fight to beat Donald Trump.

title: With Harris, Democrats would bet against US history of sexism, racism
shortDescription: The Democratic party will be taking a historic gamble if it turns to Vice President Kamala Harris to become its presidential candidate.

title: A moment in history: Biden's exit a rarity in the U.S. presidency
shortDescription: No president in the modern era has dropped out of the race so close to the election. Historians say the next steps are uncharted territory.

title: From exhausted to energized: Biden exit sends shockwaves across US
shortDescription: It's been a crazy few weeks in American politics, including an assassination attempt and now an incumbent president dropping his re-election bid

title: Secret Service gets 45-day review after Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: A bipartisan panel will review the Secret Service for 45 days after the assassination attempt on former president Donald Trump.

title: Trump donated money to re-elect Kamala Harris as California's AG
shortDescription: Before he first ran for president, Donald Trump once donated money to re-elect Kamala Harris as California attorney general.

title: Biden tapped Harris. But it’s DNC delegates who get to decide.
shortDescription: Biden may have endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris to be the Democratic presidential nominee, but it's the delegates themselves who will decide.

title: See what constitutional scholars say about Obama serving as VP
shortDescription: Former President Barack Obama has been floated as a potential vice-presidential pick after President Joe Biden dropped out of the race Sunday.

title: Harris reacts after Biden drops out of race
shortDescription: Joe Biden announced he would drop out of the 2024 race and endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris as the Democratic Party's nominee.

title: TN's Democratic delegates vote to endorse Kamala Harris for president
shortDescription: On a Sunday afternoon call, Tennessee's DNC delegation voted to back the vice president for the presidential nomination.

title: When is the 2024 presidential election? Key dates for voting this year
shortDescription: Here's what to know about the 2024 presidential election dates and when you can vote in your state.

title: Voters react to Biden stepping down
shortDescription: Voters react to President Joe Biden's decision to drop out of the 2024 race and endorse Kamala Harris.

title: Trump's new campaign plan: Attack Kamala Harris - and Joe Biden
shortDescription: Trump allies said they would use Biden's record on immigration and the economy against any Democratic opponent, including VP Harris.

title: Trump reacts to Biden leaving race
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump posted a reaction to President Joe Biden leaving the presidential race on Truth Social.

title: Obama calls Biden a 'patriot of the highest order'
shortDescription: After President Joe Biden decided to drop out of the 2024 Election, former President Barack Obama issued a statement you can read here.

title: Clintons endorse Kamala Harris after Biden exits presidential race
shortDescription: Bill and Hillary Clinton quickly endorsed Kamala Harris for the Democratic nomination after Biden announced his intention to exit the race.

title: Republicans will challenge replacement of Biden
shortDescription: "That's not how this is supposed to work." House speaker Mike Johnson said Republicans will challenge Democratic efforts to replace Biden.

title: VP Kamala Harris running for president after Biden exits
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris said she intends to earn and win the 2024 Democratic nomination after President Joe Biden quit the race and endorsed her.
